<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>啊！你的武器还是满的……<unk[5:1]>
难道你有收藏的爱好卓啦？
等你整理出空位再来找我吧，
到时候我就能把<Color=red>卓拉之枪<Color=white>给你了卓啦！

コレクションが<Ruby={4:6}しゅみ>趣味ゾラ？

<Color=red>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:4}やり>槍<Color=white>をお<Ruby={2:4}わた>渡しできるゾラよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Ah, you still have too many weapons.<unk[5:1]>
You must enjoy collecting things, hm?

When you have made some space, I will
hand over this <Color=red>Zora spear<Color=white>!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>谢谢你的帮助卓啦！
请收下这柄<Color=red>卓拉之枪<Color=white>吧！<unk[5:0]>
它也和其他武器一样在天地异变的时候
损坏了……<unk[5:0]>但也不至于完全不能用卓啦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>謝謝你救了我卓啦！
請收下這把<Color=red>卓拉之槍<Color=white>！<unk[5:0]>
雖然和其他武器一樣，在天地異變時腐朽了……<unk[5:0]>
但還不至於無法使用卓啦！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}たす>助けてくれて ありがとうゾラ！
この<Color=red>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:4}やり>槍<Color=white>をどうぞ！<unk[5:0]>
これも<Ruby={2:4}ほか>他の<Ruby={4:4}ぶき>武器と<Ruby={2:4}おな>同じで <Ruby={8:12}てんぺんちい>天変地異のときに
<Ruby={2:2}く>朽ちてしまったけど… <unk[5:0]><Ruby={2:4}つか>使えなくはないゾラよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>Thank you for saving me!<unk[5:0]> Here, this
<Color=red>Zora spear <Color=white>is yours now.

Just like the other weapons, this fell to
decay during the Upheaval. Still...<unk[5:0]>it is not
completely without use.

rows.CNzh:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>淤泥都消失了！！

<unk[3:0:263]><Size=100>我被淤泥缠身，连鳃都堵住了，<unk[5:0]>
就在我觉得要完蛋的时候……<unk[5:0]>突然就消失了！<Size=125><Size=100>
哎呀～我也不清楚发生了什么，总之得救了卓啦！

<Size=125><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>淤泥都消失了卓啦！！

rows.JPja:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>ヘドロが<Ruby={2:2}き>消えたゾラ！！

<unk[3:0:263]><Size=100>ヘドロにまみれて エラも<Ruby={2:2}つ>詰まり<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>The sludge is gone!<Size=100>


<Size=125><unk[3:0:263]><Size=100>I was covered in sludge and my gills were
filling up fast.<unk[5:0]> I thought it was all over for
me. <unk[5:0]>But then, all of a sudden...<Size=125><Size=100>
Well, I am not sure precisely what
transpired, but one thing is certain.
I am saved!

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]>Huh?!<unk[5:0]> So the sludge disappeared thanks
to Prince Sidon...<unk[5:0]>and what's more, he has
ascended the throne?!
<unk[3:0:260]>Wow!


<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Thank you so much for letting me know!<unk[5:1]>
I owe you a token of gratitude.
